---
name: Replication / falsification report
about: Log an external run against a registered E-series protocol
title: "[REPLICATION] <protocol id> — <pass/fail/inconclusive>"
labels: replication
---

**Protocol:** (e.g. E-LI-1b, doc reference or paper section)
**Registered thresholds used:** (verbatim; note any you could not apply)
**Implementation:** (committed pipeline / independent reimplementation — link code)
**Seeds and data:** (exact seeds, zero tables / datasets with versions)
**Gate outcomes:** (each validity gate, pass/fail, numbers)
**Endpoint result:** (statistics vs registered thresholds)
**Verdict claimed:** (per the protocol's own frozen criteria)
**Deviations:** (anything that departed from the registered spec, declared here)

Reports are adjudicated against the protocol's own gates and deviations policy.
Falsifications are welcome and, if verified, enter the encyclopedia's kill list
with the challenger credited.
